headlines.title: Putin heads to Beijing days after Trump in test of China's balancing act
headlines.summary: Beijing walks into the summit with the stronger hand while Moscow seeks reassurance that China has not drifted toward Washington after Trump's visit.

headlines.title: Musk slams Altman trial verdict as a 'technicality,' vows to appeal
headlines.summary: A jury in Oakland, California, ruled against Elon Musk in his dramatic court battle with Sam Altman and OpenAI.

headlines.title: After U.S. SEC, Treasury and Justice Department offer billionaire Gautam Adani legal relief
headlines.summary: The U.S. Treasury Department settled a case against Adani Enterprises, involving the purchase of sanctioned Iranian energy between November 2023 and June 2025.

headlines.title: Trump says he's postponing 'scheduled attack of Iran tomorrow' at Middle East leaders' request
headlines.summary: The U.S. and Iran are in a stalemate centered on the Strait of Hormuz, the global oil pathway whose closure due to the war has caused an energy supply shock.

headlines.title: Japan's economy grows at annualized 2.1% rate in first quarter, beating expectations
headlines.summary: The growth was sharply higher compared with Reuters-polled analysts' average estimate of 1.7%, and against the 1.3% in the previous quarter.

headlines.title: Oil prices fall as Trump postpones Iran strike, easing supply disruption fears
headlines.summary: Oil prices fell after U.S. President Donald Trump said he would postpone a planned military strike on Iran following requests from key Middle Eastern leaders.

headlines.title: Nvidia bulls mount uphill battle into earnings
headlines.summary: Call volume outpaced puts by more than double on Monday, though more calls were exchanged at the bid or below, meaning likely sold.

headlines.title: Warren Buffett teased to CNBC a ‘tiny purchase’ in March. Berkshire filing may have revealed it
headlines.summary: When asked in March whether Berkshire was still putting money to work, Buffett said the conglomerate had made "one tiny purchase."

headlines.title: Higher aluminum prices are powering one former Dow component. Here's how to buy for less
headlines.summary: Despite elevated aluminum production costs and shipment timing issues, Alcoa (AA) is strongly capitalizing on structurally higher prices.

headlines.title: Top Wall Street analysts suggest these 3 stocks for their long-term prospects
headlines.summary: Robust spending and strong demand for AI infrastructure have reinforced analysts' confidence in several stocks after earnings season.

headlines.title: For better or worse, investors are living through Trump’s stock market. Here's why
headlines.summary: President Donald Trump has been considered the ultimate stock market president, overseeing an expansion to record highs as well as major declines.

headlines.title: Berkshire's new CEO overhauls portfolio, dumping a slate of stocks
headlines.summary: Berkshire Hathaway's equity portfolio got one of its biggest renovations ever during Greg Abel's first three months as the company's CEO.

headlines.title: The bond market has a warning for the Fed: Get serious about inflation and potential rate hikes ASAP
headlines.summary: Tough talk from the Federal Reserve about rate hikes may be needed to ease the Treasury market’s rout.

headlines.title: I inherited a house. My CPA says I should sell within a year to avoid capital gains. Is he right?
headlines.summary: “We plan to sell it to another family member for the appraised value.”

headlines.title: ‘He didn’t really pay attention’: I told my friend he left millions on the table in retirement. Did I do the right thing?
headlines.summary: “He lived very frugally and maxed out his 401(k)s.”

headlines.title: What NextEra and Dominion’s giant utility merger means for your electric bill
headlines.summary: Three-quarters of Americans say their home energy costs have climbed in recent years

headlines.title: Lululemon hits back at its founder after months of attacks, saying he’s just jealous
headlines.summary: Lululemon says Chip Wilson has “coveted” the company since he left, and that his vision “appears to be frozen in time.”

headlines.title: Oil climbs as Trump warns the ‘clock is ticking’ on Iran, but there’s a bigger danger lurking on the horizon
headlines.summary: Oil futures climbed on Monday, getting a boost after President Donald Trump warned that the “clock is ticking” on Iran, but a loss of the buffers used to cushion supply disruptions could spark the next significant move higher for prices.
